name: Albacross B2B Website Visitor Identification API
what_it_does: B2B website visitor identification platform with REST API — identifying anonymous website visitors by company using IP-to-company mapping, providing intent signals from page views and content engagement, integrating with CRM and marketing automation, and delivering account-level buying intent data for sales and marketing teams.
use_cases: Querying identified company visitors for real-time sales team notifications
Pulling account intent scores from website engagement for ABM prioritization
Integrating Albacross visitor data with Salesforce for account-level pipeline enrichment
Automating HubSpot contact enrichment when target accounts visit website
Building lookalike audience segments from high-intent visitor company profiles
not_for: B2C consumer visitor identification (requires consent, not company-level)
Contact-level visitor identification (Albacross identifies companies, not individuals)
Email marketing and outreach (use Salesloft or Outreach for execution)
best_when: A B2B marketing or sales development team wants to identify which companies are visiting their website anonymously and prioritize outreach to high-intent accounts based on content engagement signals.
avoid_when: You're B2C, need individual contact identification, operate primarily outside Europe and North America (lower IP coverage), or need full marketing automation rather than intent signals.

auth.notes: API key from Albacross account settings. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. JavaScript tracking snippet for website visitor capture. Webhook for new company visit events. No OAuth2. CRM integrations (Salesforce, HubSpot) via native connectors in admin.

pricing.notes: Swedish company (Stockholm). Founded 2010. Raised $14M. Strong European IP database — superior coverage in EU vs US-focused competitors. GDPR-compliant company-level identification (not individual tracking). Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack native integrations. LinkedIn company matching for ad retargeting. Popular with European SaaS companies.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for visitor data, company profiles, and intent signals. Bearer token auth. Good developer documentation. JavaScript snippet required for visitor capture — server-side API is read-only for identified data. Webhook for real-time visit notifications. CRM sync configured in admin.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Visitor reads fully idempotent. Company profile reads idempotent. Intent signal reads idempotent by date range.
known_agent_gotchas: JavaScript tracking snippet required on website — no tracking without client-side tag
Company identification (not individual) — GDPR-compliant but no contact-level data
IP database coverage varies by geography — strongest in EU and North America
Domain verification required for website tracking setup
CRM integrations configured in admin — not API-driven sync

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Company-level identification avoids individual PII — GDPR-friendly design. JavaScript tracking tag on website — review CSP headers. Swedish company with strong EU data protection standards. No individual user data retained.
